headline: Is It Time To Reassess Verizon (VZ) After A Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: If you are wondering whether Verizon Communications at around US$47.24 is offering fair value or a potential mispricing opportunity, this breakdown will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has returned 2.1% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return is a 6.1% decline. The year to date and 1 year returns are 16.6% and 17.4% respectively. Taken together, this gives you a mixed short term and stronger recent longer term picture to keep in mind. Recent headlines around Verizon...
